message:
fix(ci,io,ndarray,ufunc): pin nightly toolchain, harden header parsing, and propagate integer sidecars through mutation paths

CI: pin Rust toolchain to nightly-2026-02-20 via dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
and serialize all gate jobs (G2..G8) with `needs:` dependencies so they
run sequentially instead of in parallel.

fnp-io: replace unchecked `header_offset + header_len` additions with
checked_add in read_npy_bytes, memmap_npy, and load_structured to
prevent integer overflow; add bounds check for truncated payloads.

fnp-ndarray: collapse redundant zero-product branch in
fix_unknown_dimension into the existing incompatible-element-count
error path.

fnp-ufunc: propagate integer sidecars through put_along_axis, place,
put, and fill_diagonal mutation paths via new helper methods
ensure_mutable_integer_sidecar and write_integer_mutation; add
ensure_exact_integer_bridge_value_supported guard to itemset; preserve
integer sidecars in extract (np.extract) via reindexed_integer_sidecar;
add tests for sidecar materialization and inexact-value rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,34 +18,39 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2026-02-20
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - run: cargo fmt --check
       - run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
 
   g2-unit-property:
     name: "G2: unit + property"
+    needs: g1-fmt-lint
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2026-02-20
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - run: cargo test --workspace --lib
 
   g3-differential:
     name: "G3: differential"
+    needs: g2-unit-property
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     env:
       FNP_REQUIRE_REAL_NUMPY_ORACLE: "1"
       FNP_ORACLE_PYTHON: "python3"
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2026-02-20
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
@@ -72,33 +77,39 @@ jobs:
 
   g4-adversarial-security:
     name: "G4: adversarial + security"
+    needs: g3-differential
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2026-02-20
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - run: cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_security_gate
 
   g5-test-contract:
     name: "G5: test contract"
+    needs: g4-adversarial-security

     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2026-02-20
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - run: cargo run -p fnp-conformance --bin run_test_contract_gate
 
   g6-workflow-forensics:
     name: "G6: workflow + forensics"
+    needs: g5-test-contract
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2026-02-20
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - run: >
@@ -107,11 +118,13 @@ jobs:
 
   g7-performance-budget:
     name: "G7: performance budget"
+    needs: g6-workflow-forensics
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly

         with:
+          toolchain: nightly-2026-02-20
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - name: Generate candidate baseline

         with:

           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
       - run: >
